title: ANDSCliOutput
description: Machine-readable output contract for all ANDS CLI commands. Agents parse this JSON; do not rely on stderr/stdout prose.

outputVersion.description: Output schema version (semver). Pin to this when parsing.

command.description: The CLI sub-command that produced this output.

file.description: File path argument (present for validate command).

ok.description: True if the command completed without errors. Check this first.

exitCode.description: Process exit code. 0 = success. See exit-codes.ts for category mapping. 6 = transient (retry); 1-5 = permanent (fix first).

issues.description: List of issues found. Empty when ok=true.

data.description: Command-specific structured output data (present on success).

category.description: Broad issue category for programmatic grouping.

code.description: SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE machine-readable code. Stable across versions.

path.description: JSON path to the problematic value within the intent/config object.

loc.description: Source file location of the issue.

hint.description: Actionable prose suggestion for fixing the issue.

suggestion.description: Concrete next CLI command for agents to run as a recovery step. Always a runnable ands command.
